name: california-siskiyou
description: Siskiyou County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Siskiyou County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Siskiyou County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Siskiyou County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Siskiyou County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Siskiyou County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-siskiyou-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-siskiyou-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page contains a navigation link to '/supervisors' which is the listing page for representatives.
Representative data is likely contained within a specific container or grid layout, potentially using classes like 'views-row' or similar Drupal view structures.
The 'detailUrl' is expected to be an absolute URL found within an anchor tag pointing to the individual supervisor's profile.
The 'photoUrl' is expected to be an absolute URL found within an image tag's 'src' attribute.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Siskiyou County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Siskiyou County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Siskiyou County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Siskiyou County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — No NetFile portal found for Siskiyou; uses county-hosted campaign statements page.
